DIAGNOSTIC_TEST_SLOWNESS.title: Deep Audit: Test Suite Performance & GC Overhead
DIAGNOSTIC_TEST_SLOWNESS.instruction_raw: Analyze the extreme test slowness (1h+ hangs). Focus exclusively on the performance impact of `gc.get_objects()` in `tests/conftest.py::gc_collect_harder`. Profile the object iteration cost and determine if this broad loop is the primary bottleneck. Output a detailed profile and a targeted optimization strategy. Path: gemini-output/analysis/REPORT_TEST_SLOWNESS.md

DIAGNOSTIC_WEAKREF_ERROR.title: Deep Audit: ReferenceError & Weakref Stability
DIAGNOSTIC_WEAKREF_ERROR.instruction_raw: Analyze the `ReferenceError: weakly-referenced object no longer exists` encountered in `tests/finance/test_settlement_integrity.py`. Audit the `weakref.proxy(government)` usage in `modules/finance/system.py` against the lifecycle of pytest fixtures in `conftest.py`. Identify exactly when the referenced object is GC'd and why the proxy fails. Output a root-cause analysis and a memory-safe redesign. Path: gemini-output/analysis/REPORT_WEAKREF_ERROR.md

SCENARIO_4_PIPELINE_BLUEPRINT.title: Scenario Blueprint: Automated Reporting Pipeline
SCENARIO_4_PIPELINE_BLUEPRINT.instruction_raw: 1~3단계의 결과물을 종합하여, pytest 실행 시 WorldState 메트릭이 수집되어 자동으로 Scenario Verdict 리포트로 변환되는 엔드투엔드 파이프라인 설계도를 작성하세요.
